activeCraftingRules.defaultMeasure: One material measure counts as a small item unless a recipe says otherwise.
activeCraftingRules.substitutionRule: A substitute material should have equal or higher rarity; substance and element can change when the fiction and recipe support it.

genericMonsterTypeMaterials.description: Generic fallback materials for each standard 5e creature type. Use these when a recipe can accept any harvested material from that creature type instead of a named monster-specific material.

materials.name: Warped eye gel
materials.description: A faintly aware gel suitable for minor psychic mixtures.

materials.name: Twisted nerve
materials.description: A knot of alien nerve tissue that reacts to nearby thoughts.

materials.name: Dreaming tentacle
materials.description: A soft appendage that twitches through dreams before it moves.

materials.name: Far Realm ichor
materials.description: A mind-bending ichor from a body that should not exist.

materials.name: Impossible cortex
materials.description: A folded alien cortex useful for the most dangerous mental crafts.

materials.name: Starless truth organ
materials.description: A singular organ that seems to know what reality is hiding.

materials.name: Beast hide
materials.description: A practical hide for simple wilderness crafts.

materials.name: Keen fang
materials.description: A sharp natural tooth suited to hooks, charms, and weapon details.

materials.name: Primal heart
materials.description: A strong heart from a beast that survived by instinct and strength.

materials.name: Alpha pelt
materials.description: A dominant beast pelt that carries territorial power.

materials.name: Worldbeast sinew
materials.description: A mighty tendon used in bows, bindings, and endurance crafts.

materials.name: First hunt trophy
materials.description: A singular trophy said to remember the first predator and prey.

materials.name: Blessed feather
materials.description: A soft feather touched by gentle holy light.

materials.name: Luminous blood
materials.description: A golden fluid that glimmers in darkness.

materials.name: Halo glass shard
materials.description: A clear shard that bends light into a perfect ring.

materials.name: Sanctified horn
materials.description: A pure horn fragment suited to warding, healing, and judgment.

materials.name: Empyrean heart
materials.description: A holy heart that pulses with calm, ordered power.

materials.name: First light mote
materials.description: A singular mote of light from before shadow had a name.

materials.name: Animated rivet
materials.description: A small fastener that still remembers motion.

materials.name: Command gear
materials.description: A gear shaped by orders, rhythm, and obedience.

materials.name: Arcane actuator
materials.description: A worked component that converts magic into movement.

materials.name: Living stone core
materials.description: A stone core animated by precise binding magic.

materials.name: Prime command matrix
materials.description: A perfect command pattern suspended in arcane force.

materials.name: First-forged heart
materials.description: A singular heart from a construct shaped by the first true command.

materials.name: Shed dragon scale
materials.description: A shed scale carrying broad draconic resilience without a strong element.

materials.name: Wyrm tooth
materials.description: A draconic tooth suitable for trophies, weapons, and binding rites.

materials.name: Dragon heartblood
materials.description: A measure of potent draconic blood before a specific breath element dominates it.

materials.name: Ancient scale plate
materials.description: A thick scale plate hardened by age, magic, and pride.

materials.name: Wyrm soul ember
materials.description: A condensed spark of draconic will and spell-resistant power.

materials.name: First wyrm heartstone
materials.description: A singular heartstone tied to the oldest myth of dragonkind.

materials.name: Planar residue
materials.description: A faint trace left where elemental matter touched the world.

materials.name: Elemental mote
materials.description: A small mote of unstable planar substance.

materials.name: Living core
materials.description: A core that hums with raw elemental structure.

materials.name: Bottled primal storm
materials.description: A sealed storm of mixed elemental pressure.

materials.name: Elemental heartstone
materials.description: A heartstone formed where planar forces crystallize.

materials.name: First element spark
materials.description: A singular spark from the boundary between matter and magic.

materials.name: Glamour dust
materials.description: A sparkling dust that changes slightly when watched.

materials.name: Moonlit petal
materials.description: A fey petal that remembers moonlight and music.

materials.name: Feywild silk
materials.description: A strand of impossible silk woven from charm and twilight.

materials.name: True-name thorn
materials.description: A thorn that pricks harder when spoken names are false.

materials.name: Heart of revelry
materials.description: A laughing, dangerous spark of fey celebration and bargain-magic.

materials.name: First promise blossom
materials.description: A singular blossom bound to the oldest kept promise in the Feywild.

materials.name: Ash-black horn chip
materials.description: A chipped horn fragment stained by malice and ash.

materials.name: Infernal ichor
materials.description: A hot fiendish ichor that leaves a sulfurous stain.

materials.name: Hellwrought hide
materials.description: A scorched hide useful for infernal armor and bindings.

materials.name: Abyssal heart
materials.description: A corrupt heart that beats with spite after harvest.

materials.name: Pactfire soul ash
materials.description: Ash from a soul burned by bargain, punishment, or hunger.

materials.name: Original sin brand
materials.description: A singular mark of ancient corruption that refuses redemption.

materials.name: Giant hide
materials.description: A large strip of tough giant skin for heavy practical crafts.

materials.name: Giant knucklebone
materials.description: A massive joint bone used in strength and structure recipes.

materials.name: Runed stone chip
materials.description: A stone chip marked with oversized craft or clan signs.

materials.name: Titan sinew
materials.description: A cable-thick sinew suited to siege-scale bindings.

materials.name: Storm giant blood
materials.description: A crackling blue blood from the highest giant bloodlines.

materials.name: First titan tooth
materials.description: A singular tooth from a mythic ancestor of giantkind.

materials.name: Worn strap
materials.description: A practical strip of worn gear cloth or leather binding.

materials.name: Worked tool steel
materials.description: A salvageable piece of worked steel shaped by skilled hands.

materials.name: Oathmarked bone charm
materials.description: A carved charm marked by culture, oath, or station.

materials.name: Heroic blood measure
materials.description: A rare blood measure from a person of exceptional will or fate.

materials.name: Crown-forged signet
materials.description: A signet of authority, history, and binding law.

materials.name: True name relic
materials.description: A singular relic bound to the true name of a person or lineage.

materials.name: Monster claw
materials.description: A hard claw from a dangerous unnatural predator.

materials.name: Strange hide
materials.description: A tough hide with an odd pattern, texture, or smell.

materials.name: Hybrid heart
materials.description: A heart from a body that combines traits nature rarely permits.

materials.name: Chimera marrow
materials.description: A marrow sample carrying unstable monstrous inheritance.

materials.name: Apex predator essence
materials.description: A condensed essence of impossible hunger, adaptation, and dominance.

materials.name: First monster fang
materials.description: A singular fang from the first thing named monster.

materials.name: Ooze slime
materials.description: A basic measure of unstable slime for corrosive recipes.

materials.name: Caustic jelly
materials.description: A thicker jelly that slowly etches poor containers.

materials.name: Living nucleus
materials.description: A trembling nucleus that holds an ooze together.

materials.name: Dissolving ichor
materials.description: A powerful ichor prized for alchemy, traps, and cursed solvents.

materials.name: Primordial solvent
materials.description: A legendary solvent said to remember the first dissolution.

materials.name: First hunger gel
materials.description: A singular gel of appetite without organs, thought, or mercy.

materials.name: Wild root fiber
materials.description: A tough root fiber useful for natural bindings.

materials.name: Verdant sap
materials.description: A green sap that carries stubborn growth.

materials.name: Heartwood knot
materials.description: A dense knot of living heartwood.

materials.name: Dreamseed pod
materials.description: A rare seed pod that sprouts best near sleeping minds.

materials.name: Elder bloom
materials.description: A legendary bloom from a plant old enough to know seasons as people.

materials.name: Worldroot splinter
materials.description: A singular splinter from a root said to hold the world in place.

materials.name: Grave dust
materials.description: A pinch of dust gathered from restless remains.

materials.name: Restless bone
materials.description: A bone that keeps a trace of the magic that moved it.

materials.name: Black ichor
materials.description: A dead fluid that darkens water and chills glass.

materials.name: Tomb shroud
materials.description: A grave-wrapping heavy with old curses and cold air.

materials.name: Deathless soul ash
materials.description: Ash left by a spirit too stubborn to pass on.

materials.name: First grave silence
materials.description: A singular silence from the first place the dead refused to rest.

humanoidLootTiers.description: Loot tiers for humanoid NPCs. Humanoids are intentionally excluded from the monster-specific material harvest list; use these tiers for believable carried gear, useful supplies, rare consumables, and coin instead. No permanent magic items are included.
humanoidLootTiers.currencyFormat: Each coin entry is an inclusive min/max range for loose personal or carried treasure, not a full lair hoard.

tiers.label: Poor civilian
tiers.notes: Bare personal belongings, useful mostly as scene texture or survival scraps.

items.name: Map or route notes
items.notes: Mundane local directions, patrol routes, or camp marks.

items.name: Small healing potion
items.notes: Rare emergency draught; use a potion of healing if your table treats it as magical.

items.name: Small healing potion
items.notes: Rare emergency draught; use a potion of healing if your table treats it as magical.

items.name: Scroll case with maps or orders
items.notes: Contains mundane papers, not spell scrolls.

items.name: Component pouch, arcane focus, or holy symbol
Small healing potion
items.notes: Rare emergency draught; use a potion of healing if your table treats it as magical.

items.name: Masterwork tool case
items.notes: A finely made mundane kit suited to the owner's station.

items.name: Spellbook, prayer book, or ledger
items.notes: Mundane book; not a magic item.

items.name: Component pouch, arcane focus, or holy symbol
Map case with charters or orders

tiers.label: Ruler or legendary humanoid cache

items.name: Rare alchemical cache
items.notes: Contains mundane rare supplies such as alchemist's fire, antitoxin, and restorative draughts.

tiers.notes: This is a carried personal cache or secured office chest, not a full treasury.
